action.reasoning: Observation: Best result was 90.5 safe_follow_steps (iter 14). Current predict.py (iter 20) got 56.2. Key bug identified: recovery mode turns AWAY from human (ang = 0.8 if angle >= 0, but positive ang increases angle, so this turns away). Also, derivative terms may cause oscillation. Analysis: 1) Recovery mode angular sign is WRONG - when stuck, robot turns away from human making things worse. 2) Derivative terms in safe zone may oppose tracking of moving human. 3) Approach phase too conservative at moderate angles. Decision: Fix recovery sign bug, remove derivative terms, increase angular gain in safe zone to 6.0, allow full forward speed at moderate angles during approach, and submit eval immediately.
